description: Composition White round neck T-shirt made of a 100% polyester, short sleeves, contrast panel at the shoulder and mesh panel at the sides and print on the left chest Fit Regular Wash care Dry clean preferred Wash inside out with like colours using mild detergent Do not bleach Drip dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
